short.en: A small loaf of fresh brown bread.

long.en: A round loaf with a crisp brown crust and a soft fluffy inside. It still smells of the oven. Eating it fills the belly and lifts the spirits.
long.cs: Kulatý bochník s křupavou hnědou kůrkou a měkkým nadýchaným vnitřkem. Stále voní pecí. Když ho sníš, zaženeš hlad a zvedne ti to náladu.

no_target.self: you tear off a piece of bread and eat it. It's warm and fresh.
no_target.others: {actor} tears off a piece of bread and eats it.

to_target.self: you offer the loaf of bread to {target}, who tears off a piece and eats it.
to_target.others: {actor} offers the loaf of bread to {target}, who tears off a piece and eats it.

no_target.self: ulomíš kus chleba a sníš ho. Je teplý a čerstvý.
no_target.others: {actor} ulomí kus chleba a sní ho.

to_target.self: podáš bochník chleba {target.dat} a ten si ulomí kus a sní ho.
to_target.others: {actor} podává bochník chleba {target.dat} a ten si ulomí kus a sní ho.
